background_tasks.label: How do I make carbonara?
background_tasks.latestOutput: To make spaghetti carbonara, start by cooking spaghetti until it is al dente, then set it aside. While the pasta cooks, ...

history.text: To make spaghetti carbonara, start by cooking spaghetti until it is al dente, then set it aside. While the pasta cooks, combine eggs, grated Pecorino Romano or Parmesan cheese, and freshly cracked black pepper in a bowl and whisk until smooth. In a large pan, fry guanciale (cured pork jowl) until the fat renders and the pieces are crispy; if guanciale isn't available, pancetta or thick-cut bacon works. Once the pasta is drained, keep it warm and toss it directly into the pan with the pork and some of its rendered fat. Remove the pan from heat and quickly stir in the egg and cheese mixture while tossing constantly; the residual heat will cook the eggs gently, creating a creamy, rich sauce without scrambling them. Finish with a generous amount of grated cheese and extra black pepper, then serve immediately.

studio_session.title: Conversation route · How do I make carbonara?
studio_session.summary: To make spaghetti carbonara, start by cooking spaghetti until it is al dente, then set it aside. While the pasta cooks, combine eggs, grated Pecorino Romano or Parmesan cheese, and freshly cracked black pepper in a bowl and whisk until smooth. In a large pan, fry guanciale (cured pork jowl) until the fat renders and the pieces are crispy; if guanciale isn't available, pancetta or thick-cut bacon works. Once the pasta is drained, keep it warm and toss it directly into the pan with the pork and some of its rendered fat. Remove the pan from heat and quickly stir in the egg and cheese mixture while tossing constantly; the residual heat will cook the eggs gently, creating a creamy, rich sauce without scrambling them. Finish with a generous amount of grated cheese and extra black pepper, then serve immediately.

While the pasta cooks, combine eggs, grated Pecorino Romano or Parmesan cheese, and freshly cracked black pepper in a bowl and whisk until smooth.
